title: Salmon on the Smoker
ingredients: 1-½ to 2 pounds salmon, rinsed and patted dry
instructions: Mix softened butter with herbs, shallot, and onion. Place salmon on baking sheet. Cover salmon with butter mixture. Place on Traeger grill set at 275 for about 35 minutes. Remove, tent and let rest for 5 minutes. Serve with lemon wedges.
